text:
• Dynamic Rate Limiting Ingress Policy Cheat Sheet
What It Is
An adaptive rate limiter that throttles incoming MongoDB operations when the server is overloaded, preventing cascade failures while allowing the system to
recover.

- mongotune
- mongot

Overload Detection Rules
CPU Overload = ALL samples in history exceed:
(cpu_pressure > 80%) AND (dwell_time > threshold)
Memory Overload = 2 of 3 signals active:
- available_memory < 1024 MB
- memory_forecast predicts exhaustion
- oom_score > 1200
OVERLOAD DETECTED = (CPU Overload) OR (Memory Overload)
Key: Requires all 10 samples (default history size) to exceed threshold before triggering. Prevents false positives from transient spikes.
